name: Yutaka Giken Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yutaka Giken Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile parts in Japan and internationally. Its products include torque converters; exhaust system products, such as exhaust manifolds, catalytic converters, silencers, and heat collectors; brake discs for motorcycles; and motor parts, including stator cores and rotors. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan. Yutaka Giken Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Honda Motor Co., Ltd.
